response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple high-scale platforms (Stripe, Shopify), which aligns well with the role's requirements. His background in relational databases (SQL) and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes) is a strong fit, though his deep expertise in DLang and ML is beyond the scope. The high on-site presence requirement may be a minor concern given his remote-friendly roles, but his proven adaptability and collaboration skills mitigate this.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript experience with React and Node.js in high-scale environments (Stripe, Shopify)
Strong relational database (SQL) and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes) knowledge
Proven track record of building scalable, user-focused platforms and contributing to open-source projects
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; may seek higher compensation or leave quickly
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (though SQL familiarity exists)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his preference for remote-friendly roles

key_factors.factor: Relational database (SQL) and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes)
